scores.correctness_notes: Missing the required `override` field in layer YAML (a required field per gold standard). Completely omits the other two protocol types (opentelemetry/OTLP and syslog/RFC 5424) that are part of the core answer about protocol options. Does mention override: merge in a caveat but not as a required field.
scores.hallucination_notes: The label templating syntax `{{ .UnitName }}`, `{{ .ModelName }}` etc. appears fabricated — Pebble uses `$ENV_VAR` substitution in labels (e.g. `owner: user-$OWNER`), not Jinja/Go template syntax. The 'Jinja-style templating (Pebble ≥ 1.7)' claim and the specific template variables (.ModelName, .ModelUUID, .AppName, .UnitName, .MachineID) do not match actual Pebble documentation.
